code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_end = false
    if i == n
      is_end = true
    end
    mut ws = true
    if not is_end
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(b)
        ws = is_ws(b)
        if not ws
          token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_end or ws
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v % 2 == 0
            sum = sum + v
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
